attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE         
,BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           
,PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE       
,MONTHLY_BUDGET_CONV_RATE      
,ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RATE       
,SK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE         
,SK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           
,SK_CONVERSION_DATE            
,SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       
,BK_CONVERSION_DATE            
,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CURRENCY_CONV_BAL_RATE WICCBR
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
                       WHERE NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WICCBR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
                       AND   NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = WICCBR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
                       AND   NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WICCBR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE
                  )

SELECT
 BATCH_ID                      
,ACTUAL_FLAG                   
,AVG_RATE                      
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,EOP_RATE                      
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,TO_CURRENCY_CODE              
,UPDATE_FLAG                   
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
/*SELECT
 BATCH_ID                      
,ACTUAL_FLAG                   
,AVG_RATE                      
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,EOP_RATE                      
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,TO_CURRENCY_CODE              
,UPDATE_FLAG                   
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_TRANSLATION_RATES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='US'
UNION ALL */
SELECT 
 BATCH_ID 
,ACTUAL_FLAG
,AVG_RATE 
,-1 CREATED_BY
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATION_DATE
,EOP_RATE 
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME 
,-1 LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,-2 LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
,PERIOD_NAME 
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID  
,TO_CURRENCY_CODE 
,UPDATE_FLAG   
,CREATE_DATETIME
,'I' ACTION_CODE 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_TRANSLATION_RATES_BE WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
/*UNION ALL
SELECT
 BATCH_ID                      
,ACTUAL_FLAG                   
,AVG_RATE                      
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,EOP_RATE                      
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,TO_CURRENCY_CODE              
,UPDATE_FLAG                   
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_GL_TRANSLATION_RATES
WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BO' */
)STMOTR
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NICT
                  WHERE   NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  = STMOTR.TO_CURRENCY_CODE
                  )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
                              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                 WHERE  NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT =  STMOTR.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
                 AND  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =  STMOTR.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                 )

SELECT
	 FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE         
	,TO_CURRENCY_CODE BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           
	,NULL PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
	,EOP_RATE_MAX  BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE       
	,'Corporate' SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       
	,BK_CALENDAR_DATE BK_CONVERSION_DATE            
	,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
	,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
	,'I' AS ACTION_CODE                   
FROM 
(
SELECT 
	 NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
	,SMGTR.TO_CURRENCY_CODE
	,EGP.PERIOD_NUM
	,EGP.PERIOD_YEAR
	,NFMD.BK_CALENDAR_DATE
	,MAX(SMGTR.EOP_RATE) EOP_RATE_MAX
FROM
	(
		SELECT 
		 PERIOD_NAME
		,TO_CURRENCY_CODE
		,EOP_RATE
		,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		, GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_TRANSLATION_RATES_BE 
		WHERE GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		PERIOD_NAME
		,TO_CURRENCY_CODE
		,EOP_RATE
		,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		, GLOBAL_NAME
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_GL_TRANSLATION_RATES  
		WHERE GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
	)SMGTR 
INNER JOIN 
    (SELECT DISTINCT  BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
	      from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV WHERE END_TV_DATE=16000101 ) NICT
    ON SMGTR.TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NICT.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_GL_PERIODS EGP
		 ON  SMGTR.PERIOD_NAME=EGP.PERIOD_NAME 
		AND SMGTR.GLOBAL_NAME=EGP.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON SMGTR.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		 ON SMGTR.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE
	INNER JOIN 
	(SELECT NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
	        NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
	        ND.BK_CALENDAR_DATE 
	        FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
					 $$COMREFVWDB.N_DAY ND 
			WHERE ND.BK_CALENDAR_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
	) NFMD
	ON
	    EGP.PERIOD_NUM=NFMD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
	AND EGP.PERIOD_YEAR=NFMD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 
)STG
